case_title: STATE FARM BANK VS. RAQUEL FLAMENCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-27-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE MANUEL FLAMENCO (TRANSACTION ID # 15168094) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) MANUEL FLAMENCO OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK AS TO DEFENDANT FLAMENCO, RAQUEL FLAMENCO, MANUEL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2015
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15168096), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK SERVED MAY-27-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLAMENCO, RAQUEL
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-27-2015 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
